Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MATTHEW EASON, ESQ., 916.438.1819, FOR PETITIONER WASHINGTON SQUARE FINANCIAL, LLC.
RESPONDENT U. MONTANO IS ALSO PRESENT IN COURT.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER WASHINGTON SQUARE FINANCIAL, LLC D/B/A IMPERIAL STRUCTURED SETTLEMENTS' Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
